name: Drawing Contest
author: Poki
description: Drawing Contest is a drawing game where you can show off your creativity and art skills! Each round gives you a theme, and you have 2 minutes to sketch your masterpiece. Rate other players’ drawings, collect stars from ratings, and unlock cool new shapes to make your art even better. Think you’ve got the best doodles? How to play Drawing Contest? Click or tap to draw! Who created Drawing Contest? Drawing Contest is created by The Good Guys. Play their other games on Poki: Color Artist ! How can I play Drawing Contest for free? You can play Drawing Contest for free on Poki. Can I play Drawing Contest on mobile devices and desktop? Drawing Contest can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
